help.title: Help & Support
help.subtitle: Find answers to common questions or get in touch with our team.

faq.a1: Insighta is a personal knowledge management platform that helps you organize YouTube videos, articles, and other web content into mandala-based visual maps with notes and insights.
faq.q2: How do I add a card?
faq.a2: Drag and drop a YouTube link or any URL onto a mandala cell or the Ideation bar. You can also paste a URL using Cmd+V when a cell is selected.
faq.a3: A mandala is a 3x3 grid where the center represents your main goal and surrounding cells represent related topics. You can create sub-levels for deeper organization.
faq.a4: Use the search bar (Cmd+K) to find cards by title, notes, URL, or metadata. You can filter results by source type (YouTube, Links, Files).
faq.a5: Yes. Your data is stored securely and only accessible to you. We use Supabase with row-level security to ensure data isolation between users.
faq.q6: How do I report a bug?
faq.a6: You can email us at support@insighta.one or create an issue on our GitHub repository. We appreciate your feedback.

landing.ltdBanner: Pioneer Lifetime Deal - $99 (was $299). Limited spots remaining.
landing.heroTitle: The 9-cell framework that sharpens your thinking
landing.heroSubtitle: Capture, categorize, and connect your ideas with the Mandala framework. Turn scattered thoughts into structured action.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to organize knowledge
landing.feature1Desc: Structure your goals into a 3x3 matrix. Each cell becomes a focus area, each level a deeper layer of intent. The constraint design eliminates information overload.
landing.feature2Desc: Capture insights from any source — YouTube, articles, files. Drag them into your mandala cells and watch patterns emerge naturally.
landing.feature3Desc: Let AI extract key takeaways and generate summaries. AI is the assistant — your documentation works 100% even without it.
landing.step1Desc: Set your core goal at the center, define 8 key areas around it. The 3x3 grid constrains and focuses your thinking.
landing.step2Desc: Capture content from YouTube, articles, or files. Drag insights into the right cells. The structure reveals patterns.
landing.step3Desc: Watch your knowledge graph grow. AI summaries, cross-references, and dashboards help you see the big picture.
landing.testimonialsSubtitle: See what our pioneers are saying
landing.testimonial1Quote: Finally, a tool that thinks the way I do. The mandala structure changed how I organize my research.
landing.testimonial2Quote: I've tried Notion, Obsidian, and Roam. Insighta's constraint-based design actually makes me more productive.
landing.testimonial3Quote: The drag-and-drop from YouTube is magical. I organize hours of content into clear categories in minutes.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join pioneers who are already transforming how they capture and connect knowledge.
landing.ctaUrgency: This pioneer discount will soon switch to a monthly subscription.
landing.footerDesc: Capture ideas from any source, structure them with the Mandala framework, and let AI connect the dots.

pricing.title: Pioneer Lifetime Deal
pricing.subtitle: One payment. Lifetime access. No recurring charges.
pricing.faq1a: You pay once and get access to Insighta forever. No recurring charges.
pricing.faq2a: AI-powered content summaries, key takeaway extraction, and cross-reference suggestions. 500 uses per month.
pricing.faq3a: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. No questions asked.
pricing.faq4q: What happens when monthly plans launch?
pricing.faq4a: Pioneer LTD holders keep their lifetime access at the original price. Monthly plans will start at $19.90/mo. All new users get a 14-day free trial with full Pro features.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1P1: Insighta ("we", "our", "the Service") is a personal knowledge management platform that syncs YouTube playlists, generates AI-powered summaries from video captions, and provides note-taking tools for learning purposes. We take your privacy seriously. This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and what rights you have in relation to it.
privacy.s2_1P1: When you sign in with Google, we receive your email address and display name via Google OAuth.
privacy.s2_2P1: Playlist metadata, video titles, descriptions, thumbnails, and captions from your YouTube playlists (read-only access via the https://www.googleapis.com/auth/youtube.readonly scope). We never modify or delete any YouTube content.
privacy.s2_3P1: Notes, cards, and settings you create within the Service.
privacy.s2_4P1: Like most website operators, we collect non-personally-identifying information such as browser type, language preference, referring site, and the date and time of each request. We may publish aggregated, non-identifying statistics (e.g., trends in usage) from time to time.
privacy.s3Item1: To authenticate your identity and provide access to the Service.
privacy.s3Item2: To sync and display your YouTube playlist data within the app.
privacy.s3Item3: To store your notes and learning progress.
privacy.s3Item4: To generate AI-powered summaries of video content using AI language models via cloud providers (OpenRouter). Video captions are transmitted to these services solely for summary generation and are not stored by the AI providers beyond the processing request.
privacy.s3Item5: To generate vector embeddings of content using Google Gemini for knowledge graph features.
privacy.s3Item6: To improve the Service through aggregated, anonymized usage statistics.
privacy.s3P2: We do not sell, share, or transmit your personal data to third parties for marketing purposes. Your data is used solely to provide and improve the Service.
privacy.s4P1: This application uses the YouTube API Services. By using this Service, you agree to be bound by the <ytTermsLink>YouTube Terms of Service</ytTermsLink>, the <googlePrivacyLink>Google Privacy Policy</googlePrivacyLink>, and the <googleApiLink>Google API Services User Data Policy</googleApiLink>.
privacy.s4P2: We request the https://www.googleapis.com/auth/youtube.readonly scope (read-only access to your YouTube account) to read your playlist and video metadata. We never modify or delete any YouTube content.
privacy.s4P3: Insighta's use and transfer of information received from Google APIs adheres to the <googleApiLink>Google API Services User Data Policy</googleApiLink>, including the Limited Use requirements.
privacy.s5P1: A cookie is a small piece of data stored on your computer by your web browser. We use cookies to maintain your session and preferences. We do not use cookies to track you across other websites.
privacy.s5P2: You can configure your browser to refuse cookies, with the understanding that some features of the Service may not function properly without them.
privacy.s6P1: We use the following third-party services to operate the Service:
privacy.s6Supabase: Supabase (database, authentication, and edge functions hosting, AWS us-west-2 region)
privacy.s6Gemini: Google Gemini (vector embedding generation for knowledge graph features)
privacy.s6OpenRouter: OpenRouter (AI language model hosting for video caption summarization)
privacy.s6WebShare: WebShare (residential proxy service for YouTube caption extraction)
privacy.s6P2: We do not use any third-party advertising networks or retargeting services.
privacy.s7Item1: All data is stored in a secured PostgreSQL database hosted on Supabase Cloud (AWS us-west-2 region).
privacy.s7Item2: Authentication is handled by Supabase Auth. OAuth tokens and session tokens (JWT) are managed securely by the Supabase platform.
privacy.s7Item3: The application server runs on AWS EC2 (us-west-2 region) for API processing.
privacy.s8P1: We retain your data only for as long as your account is active. YouTube playlist metadata is refreshed on each sync and not stored beyond what is displayed in the app. OAuth tokens are retained only while your YouTube account is connected.
privacy.s8P2: You can disconnect your YouTube account at any time from the Settings page, which immediately revokes our access and deletes stored OAuth tokens. To request full account and data deletion, contact us at the email below. We will process deletion requests within 30 days.
privacy.s9Item1: Access your personal data stored in the Service.
privacy.s9Item2: Request correction or deletion of your data.
privacy.s9Item3: Request restriction of processing of your data.
privacy.s9Item4: Request a portable copy of your data in a structured format.
privacy.s9Item5: Revoke Google/YouTube access at any time via <googlePermissionsLink>Google Account Permissions</googlePermissionsLink>.
privacy.s9Item6: Lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority if you believe your data has been mishandled.
privacy.s9P2: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at the email below. We will respond within 30 days.
privacy.s10P1: If Insighta or substantially all of its assets were acquired, or in the unlikely event that Insighta goes out of business, user information would be one of the assets transferred to the acquiring party. You acknowledge that such transfers may occur, and that any acquirer may continue to use your personal information as set forth in this policy.
privacy.s11P1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We encourage you to frequently check this page for any changes. Your continued use of the Service after any change in this Privacy Policy will constitute your acceptance of such change.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1P1: By accessing or using Insighta ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, you may not access or use the Service.
terms.s2P1: Insighta is a personal knowledge management platform that allows you to sync YouTube playlists, generate AI-powered summaries from video captions, take notes, and manage learning progress. The Service is provided as-is and may be updated, modified, or discontinued at any time without prior notice.
terms.s3Item1: You must sign in with a valid Google account to use the Service.
terms.s3Item2: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account.
terms.s3Item3: You must not share your account or use the Service for unauthorized purposes.
terms.s3Item4: You may delete your account at any time by contacting us. Upon deletion, your data will be removed within 30 days.
terms.s4P1: The Service currently offers a free tier. If paid plans are introduced in the future, the following terms will apply:
terms.s4Item1: Paid subscriptions are billed on a recurring basis (monthly or annually).
terms.s4Item2: Your subscription will automatically renew unless you cancel before the renewal date.
terms.s4Item3: You may cancel your subscription at any time from your account settings. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.
terms.s4Item4: Refunds are generally not provided for partial billing periods, except where required by applicable law.
terms.s5P1: The Service accesses YouTube data through the YouTube API Services. By using this feature, you also agree to the <ytTermsLink>YouTube Terms of Service</ytTermsLink> and the <googleApiLink>Google API Services User Data Policy</googleApiLink>.
terms.s6P1: The Service uses AI language models (via OpenRouter) to generate summaries from video captions. By using the AI summary feature, you acknowledge that:
terms.s6Item1: Video captions are transmitted to AI service providers solely for summary generation and are not stored by the providers beyond the processing request.
terms.s6Item2: AI-generated summaries are provided for informational purposes and may not be fully accurate.
terms.s6Item3: You retain ownership of any notes or edits you make to AI-generated content within the Service.
terms.s7P1: Content you create within the Service (notes, cards, settings) remains yours. You retain all ownership rights to your content.
terms.s7P2: By submitting content to the Service, you grant Insighta a limited, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, store, and display your content solely for the purpose of operating and providing the Service to you. This license terminates when you delete your content or your account.
terms.s7P3: YouTube content displayed in the Service belongs to its respective creators and is subject to YouTube's terms.
terms.s8Item1: Use the Service to violate any laws or regulations.
terms.s8Item2: Attempt to circumvent security measures or access controls.
terms.s8Item3: Use automated tools to scrape or abuse the Service.
terms.s8Item4: Interfere with the Service's operation or other users' access.
terms.s8Item5: Upload or transmit viruses or other malicious code.
terms.s9P1: The Service may contain links to third-party websites or services that are not owned or controlled by Insighta. We have no control over, and assume no responsibility for, the content, privacy policies, or practices of any third-party websites or services. Use of the Service does not grant you any rights to the trademarks or intellectual property of third parties.
terms.s10P1: We strive to keep the Service available at all times, but we do not guarantee uninterrupted access. The Service may be temporarily unavailable due to maintenance, updates, or circumstances beyond our control. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue the Service at any time.
terms.s11P1: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. To the fullest extent permitted by law, Insighta shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of data, profits, or goodwill arising from your use of the Service.
terms.s12P1: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless Insighta, its operators, and their respective officers, employees, and agents from and against any and all claims, damages, obligations, losses, and expenses arising from your use of the Service or your violation of these Terms.
terms.s13P1: We may suspend or terminate your access at any time for violation of these Terms. You may stop using the Service at any time by disconnecting your accounts and requesting data deletion. Upon termination, your right to use the Service ceases immediately.
terms.s14P1: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Korea, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any disputes arising from these Terms or the Service shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts located in Seoul, Republic of Korea.
terms.s15P1: We may update these Terms from time to time. We will notify users of material changes by posting the updated Terms on this page with a revised "Last updated" date. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
terms.s16P1: For questions about these Terms, contact:
